summary.narrative: Marina Gate I Unit 2304 is a 106.4 sqm (2-bedroom) investment apartment on the 23rd floor of Marina Gate I, one of Select Group's flagship developments at Al Safouh Road, Dubai Marina. The unit was acquired in 2022 for AED 2.28M and has appreciated 15.0% to an assessed AED 2.62M (USD 713,226). It is currently let to a Swiss financial analyst on an annual tenancy at AED 138,000/year (USD 37,600), producing a net cap rate of 5.27% — one of the strongest yielding assets in the portfolio. Dubai Marina continues to demonstrate rental resilience underpinned by expat financial sector demand, with the subject building commanding a premium due to its full-service amenities including infinity pool, private beach access, and direct marina frontage.
summary.keyMessage: USD 713K · AED 138K/yr rent · 5.27% cap rate · 15% appreciation since 2022 acquisition · Tenant in 2nd year — strong occupancy

basicInfo.assetName: Marina Gate I — Unit 2304, Dubai Marina
basicInfo.location: Unit 2304, Marina Gate I, Al Safouh Road, Dubai Marina, Dubai, UAE
basicInfo.currentStatus: Leased — Annual Tenancy, Swiss financial analyst
basicInfo.ownershipSummary: Zhang Xi (Personal) — held in trust nominee structure (BVI entity)
basicInfo.tenure: Freehold (Dubai Marina is a designated freehold zone)

actions.title: Tenant Renewal Planning — Lease Expires April 2027
actions.recommendation: Begin tenant renewal discussions 3 months before lease expiry (January 2027). Dubai Marina 2BR market is currently achieving AED 140,000–155,000/yr; target AED 143,000–148,000 on renewal — 4–7% uplift from current AED 138,000. Engage Better Homes or Espace Real Estate to handle renewal.
actions.decisionNeeded: No immediate action — monitor from November 2026

actions.title: Service Charge Annual Budget Review
actions.recommendation: Marina Gate I RERA-registered service charges are approximately AED 18/sqft/yr (AED 20,600/yr or $5,600/yr). Verify latest RERA service charge index filing for 2026 and ensure correct accounting in OpEx model.
actions.decisionNeeded: Confirm 2026 service charge amount from Select Group building management

linkedDocuments.name: Title Deed — Unit 2304 Marina Gate I (Dubai Land Dept.)

topRisks.title: Dubai Marina Market Saturation
topRisks.impact: Pipeline of new supply in Dubai Marina over 2025–2027 (~8,000 units) could compress rental rates; subject well-positioned due to Marina Gate I premium positioning.

topRisks.title: AED/USD Exchange Rate Stability
topRisks.impact: AED pegged to USD at 3.6725 — no material FX risk for USD-reporting trust.

topRisks.title: Tenant Turnover on Lease Expiry
topRisks.impact: Some risk of 1–2 month vacancy on renewal if tenant relocates; Dubai Marina typically re-lets within 30–45 days at this price point.

marketSnapshot.assetVsMarket: Subject: AED 1,297/sqm/yr — at lower end of Marina Gate I premium comp set; upside on renewal to AED 1,350–1,425/sqm
